component.name: SteamDualBoot
component.summary: Add a Windows 11 dual-boot to your Steam Deck

description.p: SteamDualBoot guides you through adding a Windows 11 dual-boot alongside SteamOS — shrinking storage, creating partitions, installing Windows 11 unattended, and setting up a controller-friendly boot picker in the Steam Big Picture style. It then becomes a configuration pane for the split and the default OS.
